label: capability search • method • recall the right method among four distractors
notes: Precision-under-competition: four distinct methods are seeded and only `backup_database` matches the database-backup intent. Pins that a larger distractor set doesn't push the single correct method below the floor (the failure mode where added competition silently drops recall).

seedMethods.name: backup_database
seedMethods.description: Create a backup snapshot of a database

seedMethods.name: summarize_document
seedMethods.description: Summarize a long document into key points

seedMethods.name: deploy_app
